---
title: Software
title-block-banner: true
description: "This page lists various software projects that I am or have been involved in. Much of my earlier work was never publicly released, and some projects have since been archived. Active projects are typically maintained with some delay, as other professional commitments take priority."
css: styles-software.css
---

## Creator and Maintainer

```{=html}
<div class="project-grid">

<div class="project-card">
    <h3><a href="https://github.com/enweg/TransmissionChannelAnalysis.jl" target="_blank">TransmissionChannelAnalysis.jl</a></h3>
    <p>Provides a suite of functions for conducting transmission channel analysis (TCA) in Julia. It includes both standard methods—which are sufficient for most users—and more advanced, customisable techniques.</p>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
    <h3><a href="https://github.com/enweg/tca-matlab-toolbox" target="_blank">TCA Matlab Toolbox</a></h3>
    <p>The MATLAB Toolbox for Transmission Channel Analysis provides a suite of functions for conducting transmission channel analysis (TCA) in MATLAB. It includes both standard methods—which are sufficient for most users—and more advanced, customisable techniques.</p>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
    <h3><a href="https://github.com/enweg/HamiltonFilters.jl" target="_blank">HamiltonFilters.jl</a></h3>
    <p>Lightweight implementation of the Hamilton filter for time series analysis.</p>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
    <h3><a href="https://github.com/enweg/FredMDQD.jl" target="_blank">FredMDQD.jl</a></h3>
    <p>Simplifies the process of working with Fred MD or Fred QD data in Julia.</p>
</div>

</div>
```

### Archived

```{=html}
<div class="project-grid">

<div class="project-card">
    <h3><a href="https://github.com/enweg/BayesFlux.jl" target="_blank">BayesFlux.jl</a></h3>
    <p>Extends Flux.jl to Bayesian Neural Networks. This was part of my master thesis and is no longer actively maintained. Some of my students still use it for their theses.</p>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
    <h3><a href="https://github.com/enweg/BayesFluxR" target="_blank">BayesFluxR</a></h3>
    <p>R wrapper around BayesFlux.jl. No longer maintained because BayesFlux.jl is archived.</p>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
    <h3><a href="https://github.com/enweg/TinyGibbs.jl" target="_blank">TinyGibbs.jl</a></h3>
    <p>Small Gibbs sampler that makes use of the AbstractMCMC interface. No longer maintained because I do not currently work on methods that require Gibbs sampling.</p>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
    <h3><a href="https://github.com/enweg/MacroEconometrics.jl" target="_blank">MacroEconometrics.jl</a></h3>
    <p>Tiny collection of useful macroeconometric functions that I wrote early in my PhD. Archived because it was replaced by some other code I wrote (still to be made public).</p>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
    <h3><a href="https://github.com/enweg/SnT_BigTime" target="_blank">SnT BigTime</a></h3>
    <p>Interactive notebook demonstrating the use of the bigtime R library. This was used for teaching.</p>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
    <h3><a href="https://github.com/enweg/SnT_VARS" target="_blank">SnT VARs</a></h3>
    <p>Interactive notebook demonstrating the use of VARs for forecasting. This was used for teaching.</p>
</div>

</div>
```
## Contributer

```{=html}
<div class="project-grid">

<div class="project-card">
    <h3><a href="https://github.com/ineswilms/bigtime" target="_blank">bigtime</a></h3>
    <p>Estimation of large Vector AutoRegressive (VAR), Vector AutoRegressive with Exogenous Variables X (VARX) and Vector AutoRegressive Moving Average (VARMA) Models with Structured Lasso Penalties.</p>
</div>

</div>
```
